channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Transgender backlash prompts pro women's soccer team to apologize for 'too many balls' branding announcement
item.description: The new BOS Nation FC women's soccer club apologized to transgender people for a branding announcement that included the slogan "too many balls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TNT and its sports platforms to show new Unrivaled women's 3-on-3 basketball league games
item.description: The new Unrivaled women’s basketball 3-on-3 league will have its games broadcast on TNT and its sports platforms.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nevada gov backs women's volleyball players refusing to compete against team with trans player
item.description: Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo expressed his support for Wolf Pack women's volleyball players who are refusing to compete against a team with a transgender player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What does Davante Adams bring to the Jets?
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- If you are going to be all in, then you do what the Jets are doing. Today they acquired Davante Adams from the Raiders for a conditional third-round draft choice. He helps. How could he not? The 31-year-old is a 6-time Pro Bowler and a 3-time 1st team All-Pro.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028: Where will it be played before that?
item.description: Atlanta has secured the 2028 Super Bowl - here are the other cities that will host the NFL's championship game before then.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Food & Supply drive ahead of Tampa Bay Lightning game
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning hope to be the light tonight in a community devastated by back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Chloe Sparks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning donates tickets to first responders; offers discounted tickets for first 3 home games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning donated tickets to hundreds of first responders, other recovery workers, and their families following the aftermath of Hurricane Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: What is the story behind the iconic San Diego Chicken?
item.description: Fifty years ago, an iconic professional mascot emerged in San Diego, clad in bright orange and yellow feathers. For decades since, the San Diego Chicken has captivated fans with his comedic bits and sketches in various venues around the world.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers vs. Padres: Who is favored to win tonight's NLDS Game 5?
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Friday night’s winner-take-all NL Division Series Game 5 between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers promises to be a thrilling finale to a contentious series between the division rivals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah HC wins overtime thriller over Islanders, 5-4
item.description: LONG ISLAND, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - In its first ever road game, the Utah Hockey Club proved to be extremely resilient. Dylan Guenther scored his second goal at 2:18 of overtime, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-4 win against the New York Islanders at UBS Arena on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lucha Libre on the rise on the West Coast
item.description: It's not an uncommon sight here in the Bay Area: Hispanic heritage on display -- the outfits, the dancing.
item.dc:creator: Jack Molmud, NewsNation

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Nearly 50,000 participate in 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon; downtown street closures in place
item.description: The Chicago Marathon will take place on Sunday, October 13, with thousands of runners and spectators expected to attend, and several downtown streets closures already in place.
item.dc:creator: Anna Roberts, WGN 9

item.title: 22-time Grand Slam champion Rafael Nadal will retire from tennis after next month's Davis Cup finals
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Rafael Nadal is retiring from professional tennis at age 38, he announced Thursday, after winning 22 Grand Slam titles — 14 at the French Open — during an unprecedented era he shared with rivals Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI and HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam tennis champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, WGN 9

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
